results.notes: v1.9.0 introduced synthetic benchmark definitions, golden fixtures, CI, and schema validation. No model output leaderboard recorded.

Adds public-source benchmark cases, trigger routing, installable smoke checks, MCP tool-use policy, and semantic-lite scorer. Run outputs through score_benchmark_semantic.py before publishing release scores.
Quality patch: portable trigger registry resolution, bilingual Markdown validation, strict structured-review linting, reduced activation load, and safer placeholder detection.
CI portability patch for the absolute-path trigger registry regression test.
